name: Comet Holding AG
description: Comet Holding AG is a leading global technology company based in Switzerland, specializing in radio frequency (RF) plasma control and x-ray technology. The company designs and manufactures high-quality components, systems, and services that enable the manufacturing of microchips, electronic components, and automotive parts, as well as non-destructive testing of materials. Operating under the Comet, Yxlon, and ebeam brands, Comet Group serves industries such as semiconductor, electronics, automotive, aerospace, and security, helping customers improve the quality, safety, and efficiency of their products and processes.
